prompt: Create a small benchmark report artifact from existing FusionBenchAttemptRow records and verify skipped harness tasks remain separate from failed tasks. Do not include a finished patch in the prompt.
expected_evidence: JSONL, Markdown, or HTML report artifact exists.
Skipped harness rows are counted separately from failed rows.
No raw private prompt content is surfaced in the report artifact.
contamination_notes: Synthetic dirty-dozen harness task; contains no customer data, benchmark answer, or patch solution.
